sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n10148" key="a)ntimetabai/nw" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀντιμετα-βαίνω</orth>, <sense id="n10148.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">passover in turn,</tr_> <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">ἐπί τι</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0744.tlg001:5:6" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Alex.Trall.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">5.6</biblScope></bibl></cit>.</sense> </entryFree>
